baseline.observed: API source_ids: Some([]) and blank-only source ids were accepted and interpreted like a full-source scan.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because run_scan returned Ok and scanned Codex session files despite the explicit empty source list.

selected_candidate.name: API empty source id validation
selected_candidate.reason: Align explicit empty API source selections with CLI --source empty-value rejection and avoid accidental full-source scans.
selected_candidate.success_metric: run_scan returns an error for source_ids: Some([]) and blank-only ids, unknown source validation still passes, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The new guard runs before source traversal.
The RED test used limit: Some(1) to bound the baseline scan.
Focused API and CLI source-id tests were rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
